_comment: RoBERTa tokenizer ships tokenizer.json + added_tokens.json beyond the ESM-2 default set, so include is overridden to fetch them. Revision pinned for reproducible builds; bump from https://huggingface.co/Chrode/H3BERTa/commits/main. No upstream LICENSE file exists; the HF model card declares MIT, and we ship the MIT text in ./LICENSE.
